# discord_roles (Data Source)

Fetches all roles of a Discord guild (server).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_roles" "all" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Read-Only

- `roles` (Attributes List) Roles of the guild. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `color` (Number) Integer representation of the role color.
- `hoist` (Boolean) Whether the role is displayed separately in the member list.
- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the role.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the role is managed by an integration.
- `mentionable` (Boolean) Whether the role can be mentioned.
- `name` (String) Role name.
- `permissions` (String) Permission bit set as a string.
- `position` (Number) Sorting position of the role.
